methods.name: createApplication
methods.desc: Initialize the application — asset is created separately via createToken.

methods.name: createToken
methods.desc:
Create a new ASA via inner transaction.
The contract becomes manager, reserve, freeze, and clawback authority.

methods.name: optInToAsset

args.name: asset
args.desc: - The managed asset to opt into

methods.desc:
Opt the contract into the managed asset so it can hold tokens.
A zero-amount self-transfer is the standard opt-in pattern.

methods.name: transfer
methods.desc: Transfer tokens from the contract to a receiver.

methods.name: clawback
methods.desc:
Clawback tokens from a holder back to the contract.
Uses the assetSender field to revoke from the target account.

methods.name: freezeAccount

args.name: frozen
args.desc: - true to freeze, false to unfreeze

methods.desc: Freeze or unfreeze an account's holdings of the managed asset.

methods.name: verifyAssetConfig

returns.desc: The total supply of the asset

methods.desc:
Read on-chain asset properties to verify configuration.
Demonstrates Asset reference property access.

methods.name: destroyToken
methods.desc:
Destroy the managed asset.
The creator must hold all units and be the sender.
